selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest remaining immediate reduction target because it compressed several controller-relevant shadow and wrapper behaviors into one bounded spillover family.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the shadow-system duplicate tree, curated wrapper transport lane, and quarantine divergence into controller-facing authority and lineage fences.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next archive-boundary lineage packet once the shadow-tree authority fences are isolated.
Strongest next upgrade-lane contradiction packet after the shadow-wrapper control read.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the shadow-tree duplicate classes, wrapper transport claims, and quarantine divergence tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: ALIAS_DIRECTORY_NAMES_DO_NOT_CREATE_NEW_SEMANTICS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns exact duplicate subtrees into a controller rule against reading directory-label drift as semantic change.

candidate_items.name: APPEND_TAIL_DRIFT_BREAKS_SAME_STATE_ASSUMPTION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the mirror state's shared summaries without flattening append-tail divergence.

candidate_items.name: FROZEN_SUBSET_IS_NOT_LIVE_RUNTIME_EQUIVALENCE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns omission plus autowiggle drift inside the frozen subset into a controller non-equivalence gate.

candidate_items.name: CURATED_TRANSFER_WRAPPERS_ARE_TRANSPORT_NOT_AUTHORITY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the wrapper lane into a controller boundary against reading packaged shadow materials as authority.

candidate_items.name: HASHED_LINEAGE_REQUIRED_BETWEEN_QUARANTINE_AND_LATER_SHADOW
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves related proposal-doc families without implying byte-identical lineage by name alone.

quarantined_items.name: SHADOW_SYSTEMV3_AS_ACTIVE_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Duplicate-tree debt, append-drift mirrors, frozen-subset divergence, and wrapper transport packaging do not justify active-authority promotion.

quarantined_items.name: CURATED_REDUCTION_CLAIM_AS_SMALL_TRUSTED_DELTA
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent preserves broad bundled contents alongside the reduced-flooding rhetoric.

notes: This batch was produced after the earlier eight controller-facing A2-mid reductions as the ninth bounded controller reduction in this audit pass.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
